compiled_state.title: Add out-of-scope review routing to sprint SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Add between-batch out-of-scope review feedback routing to sprint SKILL.md. When code review accepts findings for files outside the task scope, sprint routes to implementation-plan to create new tasks covering those files.

## TDD Requirement
Eval RED test from task 3251-bacf must be written first. This task makes that eval pass (GREEN).

## Implementation
Modify plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md to add review scope checking in Phase 5 Step 7 (after review resolution):

### Out-of-Scope Review Feedback Detection (between batches)
After review resolution completes and before proceeding to Step 8:
1. Run sprint-review-scope-check.sh with the task-id and reviewer-findings.json path
2. If OUT_OF_SCOPE detected:
   a. Log: "Review accepted findings for out-of-scope files: <files>"
   b. Collect out-of-scope files — DO NOT route mid-batch
   c. Store the out-of-scope finding context for between-batch processing
3. Between batches (Phase 5 Step 13 continuation decision):
   a. If out-of-scope findings were collected during this batch:
   b. Record: .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <epic-id> "REPLAN_TRIGGER: review — Out-of-scope files: <files>. Routing to implementation-plan."
   c. Invoke /dso:implementation-plan on the affected story to create tasks for the out-of-scope files
   d. Record: .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <epic-id> "REPLAN_RESOLVED: implementation-plan — Tasks created for out-of-scope review feedback."
   e. Return to Phase 3 (Batch Preparation) to include the new tasks

Key constraint: fires ONLY between batches to avoid mid-batch task injection conflicts.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL.md contains out-of-scope review feedback detection logic
  Verify: grep -q 'sprint-review-scope-check\|out-of-scope.*review' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md specifies between-batch timing constraint
  Verify: grep -q 'between.*batch\|between batches' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md records REPLAN_TRIGGER: review comment
  Verify: grep -q 'REPLAN_TRIGGER: review' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md records REPLAN_RESOLVED after routing
  Verify: grep -q 'REPLAN_RESOLVED.*implementation-plan' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Sprint eval out-of-scope review test passes (GREEN)
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
